heading: Shore patrol duty: payment of expenses
label: 8264 Shore patrol duty: payment of expenses
text: An officer, midshipman, or cadet of the naval service who is assigned to shore patrol duty away from his vessel or other duty station may be paid his actual services.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6153(less applicability to Coast Guard).37 U.S.C. 306(less applicability to Coast Guard), .Oct. 12, 1949, ch. 681, § 50663 Stat. 828
